summary: R4 systems architecture review accepts M4-CAMPAIGN-AI-001. The prior bounded trace blockers are fixed: planner output now clamps to the shared protocol maximum of 16 candidates, parser and planner use the same exported limit, truncated traces retain selectedCandidateId, and a multi-candidate oversize regression proves parser success.

tests_run.result: Clean worktree on feat/m4-campaign-ai before writing this systems_architect ACCEPT handoff.
Branch diff is confined to allowed task scope: packages/protocol, packages/sim-core, tests, project task/model/goal/thread/message/route files. No forbidden paths were observed.

tests_run.command: Manual R4 diff inspection of packages/protocol/src/index.ts, packages/sim-core/src/campaign-ai-v1.ts, and tests/sim-core-m4-campaign-ai.test.ts
tests_run.result: Verified M4_CAMPAIGN_AI_TRACE_MAX_CANDIDATES = 16 is exported from protocol, used by parseM4CampaignAiDecisionTraceV1 candidate-array validation, and imported by planM4CampaignAiTurnV1 trace bounding. boundM4AiCandidates clamps oversized maxTraceCandidates, keeps the selected candidate, fills remaining slots in deterministic candidateId order, and emits a stable candidateId-sorted trace.
Confirmed the shared max constant, planner clamp, selectedCandidateId retention path, parser max check, and oversize regression with maxTraceCandidates 99 are present.

tests_run.command: rg -n "Math\.random|Date\.now|performance\.now|runtime\.world|\.state\.|acceptedCommandIds|eventTail|commandTail|new Date|Object\.keys|for \(const .* in" packages/sim-core/src/campaign-ai-v1.ts packages/protocol/src/index.ts tests/sim-core-m4-campaign-ai.test.ts
tests_run.result: No authority-time/random or hidden WorldState access found in campaign-ai-v1.ts or protocol changes. Matches are limited to tests that inspect submitted command effects or construct fixtures.
Focused regression gate passed: 2 files, 18 tests.
22 sim-core test files passed; 165 tests passed.
1 protocol test file passed; 9 tests passed.
Node and worker-compatible hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture:check passed.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root Vitest passed with 33 files and 233 tests; web Vitest passed with 1 file and 3 tests.
Task JSON is valid and in REVIEW routed to systems_architect.
Writer R4 handoff JSON validates against project/schemas/handoff.schema.json.

decisions: ACCEPT. The prior P1 blocker is resolved because planner trace output cannot exceed the same M4_CAMPAIGN_AI_TRACE_MAX_CANDIDATES limit enforced by the protocol parser.

ACCEPT. The prior P2 blocker is resolved because truncation now reserves a slot for the selected candidate before deterministic filler selection; the emitted bounded trace is sorted by stable candidateId and retains selectedCandidateId.

ACCEPT. The new regression creates more than 16 candidates, requests maxTraceCandidates 99, selects a high-priority withdrawal candidate outside the earliest cancel candidates, asserts the protocol max, asserts selectedCandidateId presence, and parses the generated trace successfully.

The campaign AI remains a pure planner/read-model consumer: campaign-ai-v1.ts calls querySimulationV1 and returns null or existing GameCommandV1 payloads. No direct authoritative WorldState mutation, hidden runtime.world access, real-time API, Math.random, or object-graph serialization was found.

Command parity remains preserved. AI outputs use existing player-facing GameCommandV1 kinds for objective update/create/cancel, march start, muster response, siege choice, and withdrawal; no AI-only command path or implicit RPC surface was introduced.

The protocol addition remains narrow, serializable, and versioned: a trace schema version, explicit decision-kind union, bounded candidate array, scalar fields, reason-code arrays, and a shared max constant. No save-format or worker-message schema change was introduced.
risks: Residual R3 risk is normal for campaign AI over command/query contracts and should proceed to independent qa_reviewer review before lead acceptance/integration.
The planner is still intentionally shallow and single-turn; richer strategic AI should remain out of this task and require explicit future tasking.
Trace DTOs are protocol-visible but not authoritative state or save-format data in this task.
requested_action: Proceed with independent qa_reviewer review for M4-CAMPAIGN-AI-001 before lead_orchestrator marks the task ACCEPTED or CLOSED.
